description_long: This is a modern freestanding cabinet with a rectangular shape and clean, minimalist lines. The front features three upper drawers and three lower doors, each with square wooden handles, and the lower doors have light tan mesh or rattan panels that contrast with the otherwise white finish. The cabinet stands on four short, angled wooden legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The sides and top are solid white, with no visible ornamentation or openings. The back and interior are not visible, but the structure suggests ample storage space inside. The overall design is contemporary, blending white painted surfaces with natural wood accents for a stylish urban look.
description: A modern white cabinet with three drawers and three mesh-paneled doors, accented by wooden handles and legs. The design is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing solid white panels with subtle horizontal lines and minimal visible hardware.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid white surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Front view with three drawers and three mesh-paneled doors, each with square wooden handles and wooden legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing a plain, solid white surface.
